title: Mystical Tree Of Life Orb Landscape AI
sourceTitle: Mystical Tree Of Life Orb Landscape AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic high-fantasy Tree of Life landscape centered on ancient towering tree with dark-green canopy and massive twisted roots and a luminous golden orb of renewal. Subject: ancient towering tree with dark-green canopy and massive twisted roots stands at the center with massive roots curling into rushing stream tumbling over mossy stones into a small pool; the canopy cradles a glowing golden orb enclosing a delicate Tree of Life silhouette. Scene: Lush mystical forest valley with moss-covered stones, a colossal waterfall, rugged mist-wrapped cliffs, deep green foliage, and a moody overcast sky behind the warm orb glow. Composition: Grand central landscape composition: tree and orb dominate the vertical center, roots guide the eye into the stream, waterfall recedes into the background, and foreground moss textures create scale. Signature Elements: Golden Tree of Life orb in the canopy, twisted ancient roots, flowing stream, waterfall, moss-covered stones, mist cliffs, and sacred landscape atmosphere. Style: Photorealistic cinematic high-fantasy art with intricate bark, moss, water, mist, and foliage textures, polished 8K environmental detail, and mythic but believable natural scale. Color Palette: Deep rich forest greens, mossy browns, cool mist greys, dark canopy shadows, and radiant warm golden light from the orb. Lighting: Warm ethereal orb glow contrasts against the moody sky, with cinematic highlights across roots, water spray, stones, and mist while preserving deep forest contrast. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
